TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Viljauljaul ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 51 buwan, 161 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 154 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, . rhzyal kki'an lingay na Viljauljaul ga Kalatadrang ru Paumeli. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Viljauljaul ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Viljauljaul ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *iljauljaul ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, . rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na *iljauljaul ɣa kalata*raŋ ru paumeli. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ *iljauljaul ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ *iljauljaul ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Viljauljaul ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 51 buwan, 161 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 154 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, . rhzyal kki'an lingay na Viljauljaul ga Kalatadrang ru Paumeli. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Viljauljaul ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Viljauljaul ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *iljauljaul ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, . rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na *iljauljaul ɣa kalata*raŋ ru paumeli. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ *iljauljaul ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ *iljauljaul ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
